meta.title: Stay at Farm El Baya - Rooms Under the Olive Trees
meta.description: Three private rooms on a permaculture farm in Testour. Breakfast included, direct booking, lunch and dinner on request.

intro: Three rooms. Each with its own bathroom, its own light, its own quiet. Breakfast is always included - made fresh from the farm each morning. This is not a hotel. It is a home that welcomes strangers warmly.

breakfast.heading: What breakfast looks like
breakfast.text: Every morning, breakfast is set. Farm eggs cooked fresh. Olive oil pressed from trees you can see from your window. Homemade yogurt. Pomegranate seeds. Tunisian flatbreads. Seasonal fruit. Juice. This is how the day begins here.

cabin.label: COMING SOON · SUMMER 2025
cabin.heading: The Olive Cabin
cabin.text: A standalone cabin being built among the olive trees. Private. Quiet. Its own outdoor kitchen. Its own sky. Available this summer - join the list to be first to know.

nearby.heading: Nearby - beyond the farm
items: Testour town - 15 min · Pomegranates, Andalusian heritage, local market
Archaeological sites - 20-40 min · Roman ruins in the region
